_comment: Fleet truck registry — maps truck IDs to Viam machine Part IDs.
Single-Pi architecture: each truck has one Pi 5 running all modules
(plc-sensor, cell-sensor, j1939-sensor). One Part ID per truck.
Add a new truck by copying an entry and filling in the Part ID from app.viam.com.
The dashboard reads this file at startup. Changes require a redeploy on Vercel
or a restart of the dev server.

trucks.name: Truck 01
trucks._comment: Part ID filled from env vars at runtime when empty (backward compat)
